applications.name: Encrypted channel receiver
applications.title: Encrypted channel receiver
applications.description: FDC3 encrypted channel demo (frontend-key pattern). Listens on the current user channel for fdc3.security.encryptedContext broadcasts. Requests the symmetric key via a signed fdc3.security.symmetricKeyRequest, unwraps it on the backend, and decrypts each payload in the browser using PublicEncryptedContextListenerSupport.
